data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_1890D4: This POKéMON won the BEAUTY CONTEST\nhere before.\pWell, guess what? Today, I made it\nwin a SMARTNESS CONTEST!\pMy abilities scare even me...
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_18915F:
I've entered a bunch of CONTESTS,
so I'm seeing how things work.\pIf you're in a COOLNESS CONTEST,
cool moves go over as appeals.\pBut smart moves and cute moves
don't go over well, for instance.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189221: That young man who won earlier had\na whole bunch of different {POKEBLOCK}S.\pCan you win if you had that many\nof those things?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189299: Whoa, isn't this place humongous!\pThe tension in the air... It's not\nlike a CONTEST hall in the sticks.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189301: MC: Okay, SMART POKéMON and their\nTRAINERS, are you ready?!\pGive it your best showing!\nLet's appeal!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189366: JUDGE: Are you enjoying this CONTEST?\pCome back with three friends, and\nall of you may enter a CONTEST!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_1893CE:
Ayayayay...
I entered the wrong CONTEST.\pI entered this tough POKéMON in the
SMARTNESS CONTEST...\pCome on, wow them with a smart-looking
ROCK SMASH.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189463: I've spent many a year, and all my\nwisdom besides, raising this POKéMON\lto be smart.\pIt won't be easily bested by some\nyoung pup's POKéMON.\pMy dear wife, are you seeing this?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189512: There it is!\pIf my POKéMON pulls a smart move next,\nthe audience's excitement will peak!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_18956B: Oh, dear, no!\pMy darling ZUBAT's LEECH LIFE is so\ncute I kept using it over and over!\pBut these mean people don't appreciate\nit at all!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189617: Even when TRAINERS enter the same\nkind of POKéMON, they all seem to use\ldifferent moves for appeals.\pIt's just like the way people have\ndifferent styles for battling.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_1896BE: I think the POKéMON look smarter\nthan their TRAINERS. By a lot.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_1896FE: When all's said and done, I still love\nSMARTNESS CONTESTS.\pThat intellectual green color...\nIt's so... So... Cool.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189771: MC: Are you entering the BEAUTY\nCONTEST, too? Good luck!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_1897AA: JUDGE: Ah, every POKéMON here is a\nmodel of pristine beauty!\pWhy, I almost forgot to score them!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_18980B: A POKéMON this beautiful...\nThere isn't another one like it.\pEveryone's eyes will be glued to\nmy beauty.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189874: Waaaah!\pI brushed and groomed my POKéMON\ncarefully for this CONTEST...\pBut I overdid it...\nMy POKéMON's coat turned all scraggly...\pWhat should I do?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_18990A: This AURORA BEAM is so dazzling,\nthe JUDGE won't be able to see it.\pUh, wait a second...\nThat'll be meaningless, then!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189981: This pretty POKéMON looks just like\nme when I was younger.\pRight when I said that, my husband\nspewed the coffee he was drinking.\pDid I say something funny?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189A1D: You know, as a woman, if I win at a\nBEAUTY CONTEST, sure it makes me\lhappy. More than usual, anyway.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189A82: Wahahahah!\pWill you take a gander at all those\npretty POKéMON!\lI just love this sort of glitz!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189AE1: You can't always win on just beauty\nalone.\pYou have to groom your POKéMON so\nit's nice and glossy like mine.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189B4E: MC: Uh-oh! Hello!\nWe're in the middle of a CONTEST!\pPlease enter at our registration\ncounter and come out, okay?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189BBF: JUDGE: Oh, such charming and cute\nappeals!\pOh, my goodness! What a perfectly\nadorable WATER SPORT appeal!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189C29: Oh, no... My sweet AZURILL was\ndistracted by another POKéMON.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189C67: My POKéMON has never won in a battle,\nbut put it in a CONTEST and look out!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189CB3: My POKéMON's PETAL DANCE is a marvel\nof elegance.\pI won't let anyone disturb its\nperformance.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189D11: Everyone's POKéMON are very cute.\pHowever, if my POKéMON were to make\na cute appeal...\pI'm sure that it would be so much \ncuter than the others.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189DA2: My child is in this CONTEST.\pCome on, dear. Go for it!\nYour POKéMON is the best!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189DF3: I think that girl over there is the\ncutest of the lot.\pWhat's that? They're judging\nPOKéMON by their looks?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189E5F: Ohh, seeing all these cute POKéMON,\nthey make we want to get my own!\pI'm going to go catch some!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..UnknownString_8189EC0: COOLNESS CONTEST STAGE\nBE CHILLED BY COOL POKéMON!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189EF3: BEAUTY CONTEST STAGE\nBE ALLURED BY BEAUTIFUL POKéMON!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189F29: CUTENESS CONTEST STAGE\nBE CHARMED BY CUTE POKéMON!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189F5C: SMARTNESS CONTEST STAGE\nBE IMPRESSED BY SMART POKéMON!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..UnknownString_8189F93: TOUGHNESS CONTEST STAGE\nBE THRILLED BY TOUGH POKéMON!
